HomePage.title: Welcome to {name}
HomePage.subtitle: Experience luxury and tranquility in paradise
HomePage.description: Discover Andalay Resort, where modern luxury meets the untouched beauty of Koh Libong's coastline. Nestled across 40 acres of tropical paradise, our exclusive villas are designed to provide ultimate privacy, comfort, and tranquility perfect for those seeking a serene getaway.
HomePage.exclusiveVillasDescription: Experience the art of tropical living with our private pool villas, each offering:

villasFeatures.feature2: 12-meter infinity-edge pools overlooking the Andaman Sea
villasFeatures.feature3: Private sunbathing terraces and outdoor salas
villasFeatures.feature4: Glass-enclosed bedrooms blending nature and elegance

HomePage.largerGroupsDescription: For larger groups, our three to five-bedroom residential villas offer expansive spaces with private infinity pools, panoramic sea views, and select villas available for purchase.
HomePage.experiencesDescription: Reconnect with nature through curated experiences:

experiences.experience1: Sunrise yoga sessions on the beach
experiences.experience3: Fresh gourmet breakfasts with local flavors

HomePage.experiencesClosure: Let Andalay Resort craft your perfect luxury escape, where every moment is designed to soothe your soul.
HomePage.bookingSubtitle: Indulge in paradise at Andalay Resort, where luxury meets nature.

Dining.title: Dining Experience
Dining.subtitle: Savor exquisite flavors and culinary artistry
Dining.description: Experience authentic Thai cuisine and international dishes prepared with fresh local ingredients
Dining.restaurantOverviewContent: Our beachfront restaurant offers a unique dining experience combining traditional Thai flavors with fresh local seafood. Enjoy your meal with panoramic views of the Andaman Sea and the gentle sounds of waves lapping the shore.
Dining.cuisineAndSpecialtiesContent: Fresh seafood daily caught by local fishermen, Authentic Southern Thai cuisine with local spices, Traditional Trang specialties and local delicacies, International dishes for diverse palettes, Vegetarian and vegan options available, Fresh tropical fruits and local desserts
Dining.diningOptionsContent: Beachfront dining with ocean views, Private romantic dinner arrangements, In-room dining service available, Special occasion celebrations, Sunset cocktails at our beach bar, BBQ and seafood grills on the beach
Dining.operatingHoursContent: Breakfast: 7.00 AM - 10:00 AM | Dinner: 5:00 PM - 10:00 PM
Dining.specialFeaturesContent: Farm-to-table ingredients from local sources, Cooking classes with our Thai chef, Wine selection and signature cocktails, Children's menu available, Dietary restrictions accommodated, Private chef services for special events

Activities.title: Activities & Experiences
Activities.subtitle: Create unforgettable memories
Activities.description: Explore the beauty of Koh Libong with our curated selection of activities and adventures
Activities.dugongContent: First, you go by a long tail boat to nearby Khao Toh Te where you make a stop and wait to observe the Dugongs as they come up to eat sea grass. Second, is a trip Dugong tower at bridge built by a fishery village and in the end of bridge with about distance of 800 meters to Dugong tower which is a scenic viewpoint and a place to observe Dugongs. Third, you can also see it via hiking and climbing the Khao Toh Te, Khao Toh Te which is a multi-meter high mountain and easy location for hiking and climbing to the top. It has a cave in the middle of the mountain and a big aperture to see Dugongs from the

Libong.historySubtitle: Discover the rich cultural heritage and fascinating history of Koh Libong, a hidden gem in the Andaman Sea.
Libong.ancientOriginsContent: Koh Libong has a rich history dating back centuries, serving as an important stop for traders traveling between China and the Malay Peninsula. The island's strategic location made it a crucial part of ancient maritime trade routes.
Libong.traditionalCommunityContent: Muslim fishing village with over 100 years of history
Libong.naturalHeritageContent: The island is home to one of Thailand's last dugong populations and extensive seagrass beds. Local communities have played a crucial role in preserving these natural treasures through traditional sustainable practices.
Libong.gettingHereSubtitle: Discover the best ways to reach Koh Libong and experience the island's natural beauty and cultural heritage.
Libong.byFlightContent: Fly with Nok Air or Thai Air Asia from Bangkok (Don Muang) to Trang Airport, then take a minivan from Trang Airport to Haad Yao Pier for about 1 hour 15 minutes.
Libong.byTrainOption1Content: Take the train from Bangkok (Hua Lamphong) station to Trang Train Station, then take a minivan from Trang Train Station to Haad Yao Pier for about 1 hour 15 minutes.
Libong.byTrainOption2Content: Take the train from Bangkok (Hua Lamphong) Station to Kantang Train Station, then take a minivan from Kantang Train Station to Haad Yao Pier for about 45 minutes.
Libong.finalJourneyToResortContent: From Haad Yao Pier in Baan Chao Mai, take a long-tail boat for about 20-30 minutes and get off at Baan Prao Pier on Koh Libong. Continue by local car (Tuk Tuk) for about 15 minutes to Baan Lang Khao and you will see Andalay Beach Resort on your right.
Libong.transportationRatesContentPrivate: Private transportation provide by resort or v.v. Arrive Trang -Town or Train or Airport (take about 2 hours)
Libong.transportationRatesContentVan: Mini-van from Trang Train Station (town) /Trang Airport to Hadyao Pier (take 50-60 mins) @1,300++ = 1,530.10 THB/van/way
Libong.transportationRatesContentLongTailBoat: Longtail boat from Hadyao Pier to Banpraw Pier Koh Libon (take 15-20mins.) @900++ = 1,059.30 THB/boat/way
Libong.transportationRatesContentLocal: Local motorbike taxi/Car from Banpraw Pier (local pier on Koh Libong) to Andalay Beach Resort (7 kms.take 10-15mins.) @500++ = 588.50 THB/car/way Total = 3,177.90 THB (one way) (2-4 people)

HomepageFAQ.q1: What time is check-in and check-out?
HomepageFAQ.a1: Check-in is at 3:00 PM, check-out is at 12:00 PM.
HomepageFAQ.q2: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
HomepageFAQ.a2: Breakfast options are available. Please check your booking details.
HomepageFAQ.a3: We do not allow pets at the resort.
HomepageFAQ.q4: How do I get to Andalay Beach Resort on Koh Libong?
HomepageFAQ.a4: Take a ferry from Kantang Pier (Trang) to Koh Libong. The resort is a short drive from the pier.
HomepageFAQ.q5: Is there a swimming pool at the resort?
HomepageFAQ.a5: Yes, the resort features a swimming pool along with beach access.

CancellationFAQ.q1: Can I cancel my booking for free?
CancellationFAQ.a1: Yes. Cancellations made at least 48 hours before check-in are fully refunded at no charge.
CancellationFAQ.q2: Can I cancel part of my booking, such as individual nights or fewer rooms?
CancellationFAQ.a2: Yes, you can cancel individual nights or reduce the number of rooms. The same 48-hour free-cancellation window applies to each change.
CancellationFAQ.q3: What happens if I need to cancel due to a flight delay?
CancellationFAQ.a3: Flight delays are not automatically covered by our cancellation policy. We recommend purchasing travel insurance. However, please contact us and we will do our best to offer flexible rebooking options.
CancellationFAQ.q4: How long does a refund take to process?
CancellationFAQ.a4: Refunds are processed within 5–10 business days for credit cards and 3–7 business days for bank transfers.

RoomsFAQ.q1: What is the check-in and check-out time?
RoomsFAQ.a1: Check-in is at 3:00 PM and check-out is at 12:00 PM.
RoomsFAQ.q2: How many guests can stay in the villa?
RoomsFAQ.a2: Each villa has a specified maximum occupancy. Please check the room details for exact capacity.
RoomsFAQ.q3: Is breakfast included with the room?
RoomsFAQ.a3: Breakfast options are available. Please check your booking details for inclusions.
RoomsFAQ.q4: Can I book directly on the website?
RoomsFAQ.a4: Yes, you can book directly through our website for the best available rates.
RoomsFAQ.q5: What amenities are included in the room?
RoomsFAQ.a5: All villas include beach access, air conditioning, and WiFi. Additional amenities vary by room type.
